title: Upgrade CFI clustering to ONC (KMeans + silhouette t-stat + recursive refinement)
source: LdP newer-corpus verification (4 parallel read-only agents over the added 2012-2026 papers + LdP REFERENCE CODE in D:/PROJECTS/QuantTradingDocs/code, 2026-06-03). Conversation: 'verifica la nueva informacion antes de implementar'.
why: Verification of the just-shipped B0131 CFI against LdP's dedicated 2020 CFI seminar + MLfAM Ch4 found our hierarchical+plain-silhouette clustering is a reasonable approximation but materially WEAKER than LdP's prescribed ONC: (1) ONC base is KMeans optimizing the silhouette T-STAT q=E[S]/sqrt(V[S]) (MLfAM Snippet 4.1 clusterKMeansBase), not mean silhouette; (2) ONC has a RECURSIVE top-level re-clustering stage (Snippet 4.2 clusterKMeansTop) we lack entirely. NOTE: the provided code/Clustering.py.txt is the 2012 ClusterCov bundler, NOT ONC — do not mirror it; port MLfAM Snippet 4.1/4.2.
value_rationale: Higher-quality clusters on noisy financial corr matrices -> more reliable substitution-bias correction, the whole point of CFI.
scope: Port clusterKMeansBase (KMeans + silhouette t-stat objective + n_init) and clusterKMeansTop (recursive refinement of low-q clusters) from MLfAM Snippet 4.1/4.2
Keep our train-fold-fit (no lookahead) and constant-column-singleton guards
Also surface importance T-VALUE (mean/std) in aggregate_*_across_folds, per LdP Snippet 6.5 — not just raw mean/std
Validate clusters vs current hierarchical output on the ema_cross positive control
recommendation: Adopt ONC before relying on CFI for the orthogonal-feature verdict; our current CFI is usable but approximate.
out_of_scope: VI distance (separate item B0140). SHAP (rejected, B0125).

history.reason: verification: CFI clustering should be ONC, not hierarchical+mean-silhouette
chore(backlog): provenance for B0139-B0145 verification commit
